---
title: "My First Quarto Presentation"
subtitle: "DS HW2"
author: "<br>Jess Kotlarek"
editor: visual
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: serif
        highlight-style: tango
        embed-resources: true
        smaller: true
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
  echo: true
---

```{r setup, echo = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(explore) # mtcars dataset
```

# mtcars

::: incremental
-   mtcars is the dataset we are using in the homework
    -   It contains fuel consumption and 10 aspects of automobile design and performance for 32 automobiles
-   It can be found [[*here*]{.underline}](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/explore/vignettes/explore-mtcars.html) on CRAN
:::

# mtcars Data

```{r}
#| eval: false
mtcars
```

::: fragment
```{r}
#| echo: false
mtcars
```

-   scroll to see more entries
:::

# mtcars Table

```{r}
vs_table <- table(mtcars$vs)
names(vs_table) <- c("V-shaped engines", "Straight engines")
```

::: fragment
```{r}
#| echo: false
vs_table
```
:::

# mtcars Graph

```{r}
#| eval: false
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x=disp, y=mpg)) +
    geom_point() +
    labs(x = "Disp",
         y = "Miles per Gallon",
         title = "Graph Comparing Disp and Miles per Gallon")
```

::: fragment
```{r}
#| echo: false
ggplot(mtcars, aes(x=disp, y=mpg)) +
    geom_point() +
    labs(x = "Disp",
         y = "Miles per Gallon",
         title = "Graph Comparing Disp and Miles per Gallon")
```
:::

# mtcars Corrplot

```{r}
#| eval: false
mtcars |>
    select(where(is.numeric)) |> 
    cor() |> 
    corrplot(diag = F, type = "lower")
```

::: fragment
```{r}
#| echo: false
mtcars |>
    select(where(is.numeric)) |> 
    cor() |> 
    corrplot(diag = F, type = "lower")
```
:::

# Thank You!
